description: 精密机器隐喻。白线on深蓝底，工程方格纸网格，尺寸标注。
base_style_prompt: Blueprint technical style. Blueprint blue (#1B3A5C) 75%, white lines (#FFFFFF) 20%, red annotations (#FF2442) 5%. White line drawings on deep blue background. Engineering grid paper background. Dimension annotation lines. Technical title block. Precision and mechanical aesthetics.
